caption: A man wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, tan suspenders, a red bowtie, and glasses sits in a studio setting. He has a distinctive, large, grey-and-white wig that stands upright and wears black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, with a background consisting of framed photos and shelves displaying clothing. Red and white logos appear on the screen, including one that reads "BOSS TALK 101" with a microphone icon and another that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST." Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, and his facial expression shifts as he talks. He begins by looking slightly downward and to the side, then shifts his gaze and head position as he continues to speak, gesturing slightly with his hand. The camera angle remains a static medium shot, capturing his upper body and the surrounding studio environment.
